*** 6 INJ *** ACCIDENT INVOLVING 3 VEHICLES. SECOND CAR REAR-ENDED THE FIRST CAR. THIRD VEHICLE THEN IMPACTED THE CRASH. OF THE 6 THAT WERE IN THE FIRST TWO VEHICLES, ALL 6 WERE TRANSFERRED TO LOCAL HOSPITAL TO TREAT MINOR INJURIES. 5 OCCUPANTS IN THE THIRD VEHICLE SUFFERED CUTS AND BRUISES AND DID NOT REQUIRE TRANSPORT TO HOSPITAL.

REPORT VIA THE PUBLIC OF THUNDERSTORM WIND DAMAGE. TIME ESTIMATED BASED ON HIGH WINDS AT THIS TIME ON RADAR FRIDAY NIGHT. CLASSIFIED AS THUNDERSTORM STRAIGHT-LINE WIND DAMAGE FOR NOW AS THE REPORTER COULD NOT DETERMINE IF THERE WAS ROTATION.
